title: Agent Log Entry
description: Schema for a single line in an agent audit log JSONL file. Each agent protocol message emission appends one entry conforming to this schema to .artifacts/logs/{session-id}.jsonl.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the agent message was emitted.

session_id.description: Session identifier in YYYYMMDD-session-N format, where N increments per session on the same date.

message_type.description: The agent protocol message type being logged.

source_agent.description: The persona that emitted the message.

target_agent.description: The persona that received the message.

correlation_id.description: Issue or PR identifier linking all messages in a work unit (e.g., issue-42, pr-108).

summary.description: Truncated payload summary for auditability. Must not exceed 500 characters. Captures the essential decision or action without reproducing the full payload.
